title: Credit Guarantee Scheme for MSEs Gets Enhanced Coverage
content:
# Credit Guarantee Scheme for MSEs Gets Enhanced Coverage

Ek important update hai. Government ne Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs) ke liye Credit Guarantee Scheme (CGS) mein enhanced coverage announce kiya hai. Yeh badlav MSME sector ko credit access mein aur support provide karenge, khaaskar un enterprises ko jinhe collateral-free loans ki zaroorat hoti hai.

**Key Enhancements:**

*   **Increased Guarantee Coverage Ceiling:** Credit Guarantee Scheme (CGS) ke under, guarantee coverage ki maximum limit ab ₹10 crore kar di gayi hai. Yeh naya ceiling April 1, 2026 se effective hoga.
*   **Special Provision for Informal Micro Enterprises (IMEs):** Informal Micro Enterprises (IMEs), jo GST regime se exempt hain, unke liye ek special provision introduce kiya gaya hai. Is provision ke तहत, ₹20 lakh tak ki credit facility par 85% tak ki guarantee coverage provide ki jayegi. Isse unsecured aur affordable credit IMEs tak pahunchana aasaan hoga.

Yeh modifications MSME sector mein credit flow ko badhane aur unki financial needs ko pura karne mein madad karenge, especially small and micro units ko.
